title: Thalyrus II Medieval Age
description: Adds themed visuals and epic battle sounds to your adventure. Dive into a unique medieval experience featuring a wide variety of medieval weapons, shields, and items.
body:
![thalyrus2-title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3b46ad273a4aebbc9efca3a32850fcbafa957e8.png)

📘 **Naming weapons guide:**

https://zachopixel.com/texture-packs/thalyrus2/guide

## 
###  🏰 Discover Thalyrus II
This resource pack transforms your Minecraft world into a completely new medieval experience, heavily inspired by iconic games like **Chivalry**, **Age of Empires**, and **Skyrim**.

Combat now features **immersive sounds**, including sword slashes, metallic clashes and the crunch of bones, bringing you into the heart of an authentic knight’s duel.
## 

### 🎨 Theme and Textures
The textures are carefully forged to immerse you in a medieval atmosphere, **with a somber aesthetic and desaturated colors**.

The combination of elements like weathered stone and aged wood will make you feel like you're living in a time where war and survival are everything.
## 

### ⚔️ Weapons and Shields
Renaming specific items in an anvil, you’ll be able to change their appearance

See the full list of available items here:

https://zachopixel.com/texture-packs/thalyrus2/guide
##

### 📄 License: 

You can:
- Personal Use: Decompile or remix the pack for your own private use.
- Servers: Use this pack on your Minecraft server, provided it is downloaded from CurseForge or Modrinth.
- Adventure Maps: Include the pack in your map with a link to the official source and clear credit to Zacho.
- Showcases: Feature the pack in YouTube reviews, including a link to this website and credits in the description.

You can't:
- Public Remixes: Publish or distribute any "edits," "remixes," or "mashups" of these textures.
- Re-uploading: Post this work on other websites or cloud storage (Mediafire, MEGA, etc.).
- Monetization: Use any part of this pack for commercial purposes or use "pay-per-click" links (like Adf.ly).
- Theft: Claim these textures/models as your own or use them in your own public resource pack.
- Porting: Convert or port this pack to other versions, such as Minecraft Bedrock.

More information: 

https://www.zachopixel.com/license
